summary: Phase M0 domain specifications are fully drafted, indexed, and updated with all authoritative resolved choices. The seven specs define the current-stable immutable reference-environment selection process, canonical SPDX 2.3 JSON SBOM, JSON-only M0 CLI documents, exact paired-bootstrap median comparator and canonical JSON performance evidence, bounded SOCK_SEQPACKET FD-3 corpus IPC with a 10-second absolute deadline, Gitleaks v8.30.1, and lowercase hexadecimal SHA-256 content identity. Every file follows the Domain Spec Template, retains Draft status, contains measurable requirements and copy/pasteable verification commands, maps every FR/NFR to retained evidence, and cross-references accepted foundation decisions and risks. No unresolved open question or M1+ implementation claim remains.
